Algorithm 2 DeepCodeProbe
1: procedure ExTRAcTDCU(SCRIPT) Extract DCU tuple from code
2:Input: SCRIPT The input code script
3:Output: DCU The extracted DCU tuple
4:if MODEL_INPUT_TYPE = AST then If model uses ASTs
5:SCRIPT_AST ← ConstructAST(SCRIPT)Construct AST
6:else if MODEL_INPUT_TYPE = CFG then If model uses CFGs
7:SCRIPT_CFG ← ConstructCFG(SCRIPT) Construct CFG
8:end if
9:SCRIPT_DCU ← Tree2Tuple(SCRIPT_AST or SCRIPT_CFG)> Convert AST/CFG to DCU tuple
10:return SCRIPT_DCU
11:end procedure
12:procedure PROBEMoDEL(TRAINING_DATA, MODEL)> Probe trained model
13:Input: TRAINING_DATA Code used to train MODEL
14:Input: MODEL Trained model
15:Output: PROBING_RESULTS Probing results
16:Probe ← InitializeProbe() Initialize probe
17:for code TRAINING_DATA do
18:DCU ← ExtractDCU(code) Extract DCU tuple
19:model_embeddings ← MODEL(code) Get model embeddings
20: 21:Predicted_DCU ← Probe(model_embeddings) Probe model
22:accuracy_d, accuracy_c, accuracy_u ← Compare(DCU, Predicted_DCU) Compare predictions
PROBING_RESULTS ← PROBING_RESULTS ∪ {accuracy_d, accuracy_c, accuracy_u} Store results
23:end for
24:return PROBING_RESULTS
25: end procedure

Require: An Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) tree
Ensure: Dictionary containing depth (D), child indices (C), and unary label (U) tuples for ST blocks 1: procedure TREE2TuPLE(tree)
2:word2VecEmbeddings ← Load appropriate Word2Vec model based on language
maxTokenIndex ← Number of vectors in word2VecEmbeddings
3:
4:vocab ← word2VecEmbeddings
5:function CoNvERTNoDEToInDEx(node)
6:tokenIndex ← Index of node.token in vocab or maxTokenIndex if not found
7:childIndices ← Empty list
8:for child in node.children do
9:childIndices.append(CoNvERTNoDEToInDEx(child))
10:end for
11:return [tokenIndex] + childIndices
12:end function function TreE2InDex(rootNode)
13:
14:blocks ← Extract ST blocks from AST starting from rootNode
15:sequenceInfo ← Initialize empty dictionary for block info
16:for i = 0 to length(blocks) − 1 do
17:block ← blocks[i]
18:blockTokenIndex ← Index of block.token in vocab or maxTokenIndex
19:blockChildrenIndices ← CoNvERTNoDEToInDEx(block)
20:sequenceInf o[i].d ← i + 1
21:sequenceInfo[i].c ← Flatten blockChildrenIndices excluding the first element
22:sequenceInfo[i].u ← blockTokenIndex
23:end for D ← Extract d values from sequenceInfo for all blocks
24:
25:C ← Extract c values from sequenceInfo for all blocks
26:U ← Extract u values from sequenceInfo for all blocks
27:return {d : D, c : C, u : U }
28:end function
29:return TREE2InDex(tree.root)
30:end procedure

Require: Code graphs represented as lists of edges and node labels
Ensure: Tuples representing depth (D), connections (C), and unary label (U) for the code graphs
1: function CFG2TuPLE(codeGraphs, nodeLabelMappings)
2:for codeGraph in codeGraphs do
3:edges ← codeGraph.edges
4:reverseEdges ← list of edges with source and target swapped
5:edgeList ← edges + reverseEdges Ensure connections in both directions
6: 7:Convert edgeList to an appropriate data structure
8:depths ← list of node depths in the graph traversal order
9:connections ← edgeList
usages ← list of node label mappings from nodeLabelMappings
10:Store (depths, connections, usages) as a tuple for the current codeGraph
11: end for
12: 13: end functionreturn list of (depths, connections, usages) tuples for all code graphs

Require: Source code codeEnsure: Tuples of node positions (D), children count (C), and unary label (U) for AST processing
1: procedure TREE2TuPLE(AST)
2:token2Index ← Load appropriate tokenizer based on the programming language
3:maxTokenIndex ← Highest index in token2Index
4:vocab ← token2Index
5:function CoNvERTNoDEToINDEx(node)
6:tokenIndex ← Index of node.token in vocab or maxTokenIndex if not found
7:childIndices ← Empty list
8:for child in node.children do
9:childIndices.append(CoNvERTNoDEToInDEx(child))
10:end for
11:return [tokenIndex] + childIndices
12:end function
13:function AST2INDEx(tree)
14:nodes ← Extract nodes from tree
15:sequenceInfo ← Initialize empty dictionary for node info
16:for i = 0 to length(nodes) − 1 do
17:node ← nodes[i]
18:nodeTokenIndex ← Index of node.type in vocab or maxTokenIndex
19:nodeChildrenIndices ← CoNvERTNoDEToInDEx(node)
20:sequenceInfo[i].d ← Extract positions for node in AST
21:sequenceInfo[i].c ← nodeChildrenIndices
22:sequenceInfo[i].u ← nodeTokenIndex
23:end for
24:D ← Extract position values from sequenceInfo for all nodes
25:C ← Extract children count from sequenceInfo for all nodes
26:U ← Extract type indices from sequenceInfo for all nodes
27:return {d : D, c : C, u : U }
28:end function
29:return AST2INDEx(AST)
30: end procedure
